text.plain: Cut of beef used in Santa Maria-style barbecue
Reacted to capturing a championship, perhaps
Dish often served with tartar sauce, informally
Terrorizer of Amity Island, in a 1975 blockbuster film
Mushroom named for its resemblance to a body part
Skater who lit the Olympic cauldron in 1998
Political philosopher who wrote "The state of a king shuts him from the world, yet the business of a king requires him to know it thoroughly"
Companion of Ash and Misty in Pokémon anime
Cold one enjoyed during a hot wash
One concerned with transparency in the workplace?
Tries to identify, as a medical issue
A military parade might go through it
Sudden reversal of fortune, in literature
Preferring to keep one's feet on the ground?
What might go off the rails?
Guitarist who played the first-ever rock concert at the Sistine Chapel
Item in a basket at the dinner table
Losing side in the Battle of Shiloh, informally
